transcript: Did you know that the Scottish Highlands are related to some mountains in North America and have some of the cutest cows? The Scottish Highlands, located in the highlands of Scotland, are a must-visit. These mountains are the same as the Appalachian Mountains on the east coast of North America, due to Pangea. Except the Scottish Highlands are home to the Highland cows.
